category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/techouse/mysql-to-sqlite3 describes a Python CLI for transferring MySQL/MariaDB schema and data to SQLite.
source_facts.description says it transfers data from MySQL to SQLite.
display_name_sources: Official docs title at https://techouse.github.io/mysql-to-sqlite3/ uses MySQL to SQLite3.
docs_sources: Dedicated official GitHub Pages documentation is linked for the project.
Official GitHub README provides installation, recipes, options, and caveats.
repo_sources: Official docs and GitHub search result identify techouse/mysql-to-sqlite3 as the project repository.
source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README lists MySQL, MariaDB, SQLite, Python, and command-line usage.
source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI data-transfer tool.
